nasb.text: I will cut off your carved images And your sacred pillars from among you, So that you will no longer bow down To the work of your hands.

esv.text: and I will cut off your carved images and your pillars from among you, and you shall bow down no more to the work of your hands;

cnv.text: 我必從你中間 除掉你雕刻的偶像和柱像， 你就不再跪拜 你手所做的；

ccb.text: 我要从你们中间除去雕刻的神像和神柱， 使你们不再跪拜自己所造的。
